warnings: PATTERN UNCHANGED for this view: 'index' matches new taxonomy definition exactly (#5).

This page (A-01) contains 3 distinct patterns side by side (inventory-first scan): this per-sheet architectural index (left column 'รายการแบบสถาปัตยกรรม (A)'), a material spec list (middle column 'รายการวัสดุ'), and a drawing-symbol legend (right column 'รายการสัญลักษณ์ประกอบแบบ') — the legend view is reclassified from t3's pattern 'unknown' to the new pattern 'symbol' (see sibling _หน้า03_symbol_legend.json). Split into 3 sibling files per established convention: _หน้า03_index.json (this file), _หน้า03_material_list.json, _หน้า03_symbol_legend.json.
doc_page_start/end values match the printed footer page numbers referenced elsewhere in this extraction pass (pages 03-09 = printed pages 1-7) exactly.
Independent read done first (own scan of sheet A-01), then cross-checked against t3's หน้า03_index.json — same 15 sheet titles, same A-01..A-15 mapping, no disagreement.
